a:r.a:t: To execute a loop with sibling loops:
for j range(0,4): // Loop B - leaf
for k range(0,8): // Loop C - leaf
Root counter: Mapped onto the CCU
Relay counter: Mapped onto the CCU
Leaf counter: Mapped onto the DCU
Loop-Delivery: Outputs the outer loop values
Loop C counter -> DCU C (data-drive mode)
Loop B counter -> DCU B (data-drive mode)
Loop A counter -> CCU A (root mode)
Loop A value -> DCU A (data-provide mode)
